question: What is the overview of the base station of a landline?
content:
The Philips XL490 base station has one main base button: press it to find handsets, or press and hold it to enter registration mode.<PIC>
The Philips XL495 base station has the same find-handsets and registration-mode button, and its base also includes a speaker.<PIC>
ret: "The Philips XL490 base station has one main base button: press it to find handsets, or press and hold it to enter registration mode.<PIC>\nThe Philips XL495 base station has the same find-handsets and registration-mode button, and its base also includes a speaker.<PIC>",["Manual22_18", "Manual22_19"]
notes: Answered from the Overview of the base station section. The two images are the adjacent XL490 and XL495 base-station figures; each <PIC> corresponds to its model's base-station overview.
